import math

class Solution:
    def calculateMinimumHP(self, dungeon: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        m = len(dungeon)
        n = len(dungeon[0])

        # dp[i][j] represents the minimum health the knight must have
        # UPON ENTERING cell (i, j) to ensure they can reach the princess
        # with at least 1 health point.
        dp = [[0] * n for _ in range(m)]

        # Iterate from the princess's cell backwards to the knight's starting cell
        for r in range(m - 1, -1, -1):
            for c in range(n - 1, -1, -1):
                if r == m - 1 and c == n - 1:
                    # Base case: Princess's cell
                    # The knight must have at least 1 health after processing dungeon[r][c].
                    # So, health_upon_entering + dungeon[r][c] >= 1
                    # health_upon_entering >= 1 - dungeon[r][c]
                    # Also, health_upon_entering must be at least 1 itself.
                    dp[r][c] = max(1, 1 - dungeon[r][c])
                elif r == m - 1:
                    # Last row: Can only move right
                    # The knight needs dp[r][c+1] health to enter the next cell (r, c+1).
                    # So, health_upon_entering + dungeon[r][c] >= dp[r][c+1]
                    # health_upon_entering >= dp[r][c+1] - dungeon[r][c]
                    dp[r][c] = max(1, dp[r][c+1] - dungeon[r][c])
                elif c == n - 1:
                    # Last column: Can only move down
                    # The knight needs dp[r+1][c] health to enter the next cell (r+1, c).
                    # So, health_upon_entering + dungeon[r][c] >= dp[r+1][c]
                    # health_upon_entering >= dp[r+1][c] - dungeon[r][c]
                    dp[r][c] = max(1, dp[r+1][c] - dungeon[r][c])
                else:
                    # General case: Can move right or down
                    # Choose the path that requires less health upon entering the current cell (r,c).
                    min_health_from_next_cell = min(dp[r+1][c], dp[r][c+1])
                    dp[r][c] = max(1, min_health_from_next_cell - dungeon[r][c])

        # The minimum initial health required at the starting cell (0, 0)
        return dp[0][0]
